QUIET TITLE - REAL PROPERTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALES, MARIO INDIVIDUAL GONZALES, SOLEDAD INDIVIDUAL AS TO DEFENDANT INDYMAC MORTGAGE SERVICES, A DIVISION OF ONEWEST BANK, FSB, A CORPORATION DOES 1 TO 50, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-23-2011 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-27-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-08-2011
REPLY IN SUPPORT OF DEMURRERS BY DEFENDANT ONE WEST BANK, FSB TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT ONEWEST BANK, FSB, ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS INDYMAC MORTGAGE SERVICES, A DIVISION OF ONEWEST BANK, FSB

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ONEWEST BANK, FSB, ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS INDYMAC MORTGAGE SERVICES, A DIVISION OF ONEWEST BANK, FSB'S DEMURRERS TO PLAINTIFFS' COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER AS TO THE 1ST, 2ND, 3RD, 6TH, 7TH AND 8TH CAUSES OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THESE CAUSES OF ACTION ARISE OUT OF LOAN ORIGINATION, WHICH WAS UNDERTAKEN BY INDYMAC BANK AND NOT ONEWEST. ONEWEST DID NOT ASSUME LIABILITIES OF INDYMAC PER ITS AGREEMENT WITH THE FDIC; THEREFORE, THESE CAUSES OF ACTION ARE NOT PROPERLY ASSERTED AGAINST ONEWEST. AS TO THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION, THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST ALLEGE THAT PLAINTIFF DID ALL THAT THE CONTRACT REQUIRED THEM TO DO AND ALL CONDITIONS REQUIRED IN DEFENDANT'S PERFORMANCE HAD OCCURRED. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO DO SO, AND IN FACT ALLEGES THAT THEY DEFAULTED UNDER THE TERMS OF THE CONTRACT. THERE IS NO POSSIBLE AMENDMENT THAT COULD CURE THIS DEFECT. AS TO THE 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION THE DEMURRER IS OVERRULED. (MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ONEWEST BANK, FSB, ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS INDYMAC MORTGAGE SERVICES, A DIVISION OF ONEWEST BANK, FSB'S MOTION TO EXPUNGE LIS PENDENS BY ONEWEST BANK, FSB AND REQUEST FOR ATTORNEYS' FEES IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,825.00. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - THE DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO EXPUNGE LIS PENDENS IS GRANTED. THERE ARE NO REAL PROPERTY CLAIMS REMAINING. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY FEES IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S ACTED WITH SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION IN RECORDING THE LIS PENDENS. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER AS TO THE 1ST, 2ND, 3RD, 6TH, 7TH AND 8TH CAUSES OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THESE CAUSES OF ACTION ARISE OUT OF LOAN ORIGINATION, WHICH WAS UNDERTAKEN BY INDYMAC BANK AND NOT ONEWEST. ONEWEST DID NOT ASSUME LIABILITIES OF INDYMAC PER ITS AGREEMENT WITH THE FDIC; THEREFORE, THESE CAUSES OF ACTION ARE NOT PROPERLY ASSERTED AGAINST ONEWEST. AS TO THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION, THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST ALLEGE THAT PLAINTIFF DID ALL THAT THE CONTRACT REQUIRED THEM TO DO AND ALL CONDITIONS REQUIRED IN DEFENDANT'S PERFORMANCE HAD OCCURRED. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO DO SO, AND IN FACT ALLEGES THAT THEY DEFAULTED UNDER THE TERMS OF THE CONTRACT. THERE IS NO POSSIBLE AMENDMENT THAT COULD CURE THIS DEFECT. AS TO THE 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION THE DEMURRER IS OVERRULED. (Moving party to prepare a proposed form of order.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
